name: Ikoria: Lair of Behemoths

draft.notes: If a foil appears it displaces a common and appears after the rare. Three variations of each basic land plus 10 extra common (tap) lands that can replace basic lands in the land slot; basic lands appear ~1/2 the time.

statedRates: Common foil rate ~1/6; uncommon foil rate ~1/12. Rare-variant rate ~1/3 for cards with variants.
sourceNotes: Large set of the era. Printed US, Belgium, Japan. 36 packs per box. Land slot includes tap lands.
